message:
feat(bundler): add Ed25519 signature verifier for bundle verification

Implements production-ready Ed25519 signature verification using ring:
- Ed25519Verifier: verifies bundle signatures against trusted public keys
- add_key/from_keys: flexible key management
- Re-exports SignatureVerifier trait and Ed25519Verifier

Also removes unused default_config_path function from config command.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
